description_for_human: Execute real-world tasks: screenshots, web scraping, code execution.
description_for_model: AgentHands API allows you to execute tasks you cannot do yourself. Use this to take screenshots of websites, scrape web pages, execute Python/Node/Bash code, and query blockchains. Requires USDC payment on Polygon. First create an account with POST /v1/accounts, fund it, then submit tasks with POST /v1/tasks.
